/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_errorhandling.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_errorhandling.dir/test_errorhandling_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_errorhandling.dir/tests/test_errorhandling.cpp.o -o test_errorhandling  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
